posts.text: Sending warm wishes to everyone in MD-08 and across America celebrating Eid al-Fitr. Hope you enjoy a meaningful and joyous holy feast. Eid Mubarak!

This week's Local Hero is Farzaneh Nabavian, Family Engagement Specialist at Montgomery Blair HS and Eastern MS. Farzaneh is universally loved for her 'Kindness Corner' where students in need can access food, toiletries or a sympathetic ear. We admire her for her awesome dedication to our young people. piped.video/watch?v=MtSg0nal…

Americans are footing the bill for Trump’s war with Iran to the tune of tens of billions of taxpayer dollars already, yet Republicans in the House are doing nothing to lower prices or defend the war powers of Congress.

Where is constitutional lawyer @SpeakerJohnson?

House Republicans are abdicating the constitutional powers of Congress for the greater glory of Donald Trump.

But only Congress can declare war, appropriate spending and create tariffs, not the president. To restore the rule of law and end MAGA chaos, we must reclaim these powers for the people.

Video

President Trump called the affordability crisis "a hoax."

Most Americans, including millions of Republicans, know this isn't true. The costs of health care, groceries, rent and other essentials are skyrocketing while the President spends recklessly on an illegal war.

Video

Mr. President, the only people making “a lot of money” from rising gas prices are wealthy oil executives and their investors. The people’s coffers are being drained by your spreading illegal war with Iran. nbcnews.com/politics/donald-…

My colleague & friend Jared Moskowitz was the target of an assassination plot by an armed & dangerous fanatical antisemite who was just sentenced to 25 years in prison. The convergence of antisemitic & racist hate with gun violence is a continuing threat to American democracy. rollcall.com/2026/03/19/beco…

Today, I journeyed to an obscure part of the Capitol basement to see the long-awaited plaque honoring the police officers who defended Congress and America against Trump’s insurrectionary mob on January 6, 2021.

To his credit, Sen. Tillis joined Democrats in demanding it be put up, but this spot is not accessible to the public. 

Speaker Johnson, come on—put the plaque in its rightful place of honor.

Video

Trump's illegal war with Iran is costing taxpayers $1 billion per day. What do we say to Americans who can’t afford health care, rent or groceries? It’s more important that the president wage undeclared wars of choice and aggression?

President Trump’s reckless and unconstitutional tariffs are making life more expensive. Now, we’re spending more than $1 billion each day on the war in Iran and watching unemployment rise. Americans are suffering and the president keeps making it worse.

Update: Emergency repairs at Potomac Interceptor are complete; the flow’s no longer being routed through the C&O Canal. Now, DC Water's crew members are focused on cleaning up the waterway and surrounding land. We’ll continue to closely monitor their work and raise community concerns while fighting for federal water dollars to upgrade and transform the infrastructure. wtop.com/dc/2026/03/dc-water…

Ukrainian soldier Andriy Smolenskyi put everything on the line to defend his homeland, his family, and his wife, Alina. When he lost his arms and sight in combat, Alina immediately rushed to his side and has not left it since. I was honored to meet him with the Smolenskyis, who are doing all they can to end Putin’s filthy, imperialist war.

MoCo neighbors, a tornado watch is now in effect for our area. Expect high winds, heavy rain and rapidly changing weather patterns. Batten down the hatches and stay safe!


NWS Tornado (@NWStornado)

A tornado watch has been issued for parts of District of Columbia, Maryland, North Carolina, Virginia and West Virginia until 7 PM EDT





— https://nitter.net/NWStornado/status/2033556684342218926#m

In her testimony before the House and Senate, @Sec_Noem told brazen lies about what’s taking place at DHS. That's why today, @SenatorDurbin and I are officially referring her to the DOJ to be investigated for perjury related to DHS chaos and dysfunction, an offense with a 5-year statute of limitation.

This week, our MD-08 Local Hero is musician and small businessman extraordinaire Vincent Richardson, founder of Takoma Park's Richardson School of Music. Vincent spreads the joy of music to children, teens and adults throughout our community.

Video
